---
title: "Teaching"
---

All current and recent courses are run through Canvas, per UT requirements. Below are selected public and archived materials.

## Teaching areas

- Statistical modeling
- Probability and inference
- Data science
- Predictive modeling and machine learning
- Bayesian statistics
- Statistical computing

## Archived courses

- [ECO 394D: Probability and Statistics](https://github.com/jgscott/ECO394D)
- [STA 380: Predictive Modeling](https://github.com/jgscott/STA380)
- [ECO 395M: Data Mining](https://github.com/jgscott/ECO395M)
- [SDS 383D: Statistical Modeling 2](https://github.com/jgscott/SDS383D)
- [STA 371H: Statistics and Modeling Honors](/STA371H_Spring2018/)

## Open teaching resources

- [Data Science in R: A Gentle Introduction](https://bookdown.org/jgscott/DSGI/)
- [R tutorials](https://github.com/jgscott/learnR)
- [What should a write-up look like?](writeups/write_ups)
